title: Wire DealColumn header to render weighted total + raw on hover
description:
## Objective Replace the column header's raw-sum display with the weighted total, computed via `computeWeightedTotal`. Keep the existing compact-currency formatter. Expose the raw sum via a `title` attribute on the figure. Always render, even when the value is 0. ## Spec Reference `.devmeta/projects/2026-05-21-stage-probability/2026-05-21-stage-probability-spec.md` — Section: "DealColumn changes" ## Scope **Files:** `src/components/atomic-crm/deals/DealColumn.tsx` — only the header `

`. Do NOT touch the Droppable / DealCard rendering or the parent layout. ## Implementation 1. Import `computeWeightedTotal` from `./dealUtils`. 2. Inside the component: - Look up the current stage entry: `const stageEntry = dealStages.find((s) => s.value === stage);` - Keep the existing raw sum reducer (it is still needed for the hover tooltip). - Compute `const weightedAmount = computeWeightedTotal(deals, stageEntry?.probability ?? 0);`. - Extract a small `fmt` function (or inline) using the existing toLocaleString options. 3. Render the `

` with: - text content = `fmt(weightedAmount)` - `title={\"Raw total: \" + fmt(rawAmount)}` 4. No conditional hiding — render even when weightedAmount is 0. ## Tests Run: `npm run typecheck && npm run lint` Expected: both pass. Manual: `make start-demo` and open /deals — each column header shows the weighted total, hover reveals raw total.
acceptance_criteria: npm run typecheck and npm run lint both pass; DealColumn.tsx renders weighted total with raw on hover via title attribute
closed_reason: DealColumn now renders weighted total via computeWeightedTotal as primary, raw total exposed via title attribute. Typecheck + lint clean.
